task: I've already commited the review-session/adopt helper work. Validate and polish the merge-back stuff. We should have a helper function for this as well. So people would be able to do something like nimbus review merge-back session_id or something like that. Then it'll merge the remediated worktree into the current branch.

okay, we've done a TON of stuff here. It looks like we have successfully got what we wanted right? A user runs a code review, a pass is made, if there are significant findings and the AI believes there's going to be more things to fix, it does another review pass..repeat until it feels satisfied or is blocked and needs user intervention. once done, the user can adopt the worktree from cloudflare, from there they can view the diffs with CLI tools and even switch to the worktree to test the code out themselves. I haven't tested merging the worktree into the checked out branch though
